scenario.name: boots_into_mode1_platformer
scenario.description: boots ($7E:E000=SFDB), the heartbeat advances, and the Mode-1 platformer slice renders: a full-width green ground band at the bottom + a white player sprite (OAM slot 0) on top. State 0 = ST_PLAY.

scenario.name: meteor_scene_composites
scenario.description: holding RIGHT walks the player to the TRIGGER -> freeze -> capture -> swap; the cutscene runs the LOCKED two-phase meteor (sprite far-approach grow -> crossover -> Mode-7 zoom+slide+tumble + red glow). hold=220 frames lands just after the crossover, in the Mode-7 phase while the cratered-rock meteor is textured (>=4 distinct colours: yellow core, orange shell, grey body, red rim) with the captured platforms+player composited as OBJ on top, before the red glow washes it. The python gate (test_meteor_event.py) covers the full sprite/crossover/Mode-7/glow/restore timeline.
